column1: # Upload to Server Manifest for secretome subproject
# Format: source_path<TAB>include
# - source_path is relative to subproject root
# - include must be "yes" to create symlink in upload_to_server/
# - Lines starting with # are comments
# - Glob patterns are expanded (e.g., *.tsv matches all .tsv files)
# Run: bash RUN-update_upload_to_server.sh
# Preview: bash RUN-update_upload_to_server.sh --dry-run
# Decided 2026-05-26 (with Eric):
# Ship STEP_2 secretome outputs only. STEP_1 evidence tables are
# intermediate and carry forward into every STEP_2 secretome row, so
# server consumers get all 96 evidence-table columns via STEP_2's
# 108-column secretome TSVs anyway.
# source_path
# STEP_2 — final per-species secretome TSVs (one per species per run).
# Glob auto-picks up every secretome_NNN[_<optional_name>] run as it lands;
# no manifest edit needed when secretome_002, _003, ... are created.
output_to_input/STEP_2-filter_secretome/*_secretome_*.tsv
# STEP_2 — provenance: validated filter manifest snapshot per run. Lets
# server consumers see exactly which filter rules produced each
# secretome variant.
output_to_input/STEP_2-filter_secretome/*_validated_manifest.json
